title: Tests to debug container start failures
body:
* Add test to reproduce issue #8631
* May need to tweak storage destination, image used is 25GB

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

<!--

-->

Discussion notes:
    * Dan prefers it being marked as skipped w/ reason.
    * Maybe generate image locally, serve via registry container?
    * Fedora VMs have 100gig root volume
    * Ubuntu VMs have a 200gig root volume
    * [There are `$CIRRUS_xyz` vars tests can check](https://cirrus-ci.org/guide/writing-tasks/#environment-variables) to see if tests are running under CI, and for a PR, Branch, or tag.
@jwhonce do you still want this in?
Will re-open if needed for testing.
